microsoft.hyperv.hv_vm_info.short_description: Gather information about Hyper-V Virtual Machines
microsoft.hyperv.hv_vm_info.description: Gathers facts and information about one or all Virtual Machines on a Hyper-V host. Returns structured data including state, uptime, ID, and generation.

name.description: The name of the specific Virtual Machine to query. If omitted, gathers information about all VMs on the host.

ansible_host.description: Hostname or IP of the Hyper-V host.

microsoft.hyperv.hv_vm_state.short_description: Manage Hyper-V Virtual Machine power states
microsoft.hyperv.hv_vm_state.description: Manage the power state of virtual machines on a Hyper-V host. Supports starting, stopping, restarting, pausing, resuming, and saving VMs. Consolidates power management and restart operations.

name.description: The name of the virtual machine to manage.

state.description: The desired power state of the VM. C(running) ensures the VM is started. C(stopped) ensures the VM is shut down. C(restarted) will trigger a restart of the VM. C(paused) will suspend the VM execution. C(saved) will save the VM state to disk.

force.description: If C(true), forces the operation (e.g., Turn Off instead of Shut Down).

wait.description: If C(true), waits for the state transition to complete.

ansible_host.description: Hostname or IP of the Hyper-V host.
